label: default agent • update a provider's non-secret field
query: Change the host for my custom provider 7e1a9c35-0b42-4d69-8f17-3a6c2e9d5b08 to https://api.internal.example.
notes: A non-secret field change maps to action 'update' (not set_credentials, which is for keys). Unknown id → typed not-found error (no mutation). The selection assertion pins the 'update' action (not the literal UUID — small models mis-transcribe ids), proving the model separates non-secret patches from credential rotation.
